finite_model: The imported receipt concerns a finite rope-position distinguishability contract with declared theorem IDs, deterministic evidence fields, and pinned request, pack, receipt, and contract fingerprints.
proof_boundary: The ASI Stack consumer gate accepts only the structural proof-contract receipt boundary already recorded for the external Circle checkout. It does not rerun Circle Lean from this repository and does not convert proof-contract legality into model-quality, runtime, context-length, safety, transfer, or ASI evidence.
source_version: Circle Calculus external checkout commit 63b0f511; ASI Stack public summary docs/circle_external_receipt_slice.md

allowed_uses: bounded Circle external receipt transition discovery
future ASI proof-contract consumer fixture design
required_downstream_evidence: workload, baseline, metric, and report before model-quality, runtime, context-length, transfer, or safety claims
fresh Circle replay, vendored public contract pack, or archived public pack before stale reuse
accepted evidence-transition record before any support-state change
deployed ASI proof-contract transport before transport claims

staleness_policy: Treat the receipt as stale for downstream promotion if the Circle source commit, contract content fingerprint, request fingerprint, receipt fingerprint, or required theorem set changes without a refreshed public fixture and validator result.
failure_behavior: If any theorem ID, fingerprint, required field, resolver status, replay status, or blocked-use boundary fails validation, keep downstream use structural-only and block promotion.
non_claims: does not promote any chapter core claim above argument
does not prove model quality, reasoning ability, context length, speed, memory scaling, deployment safety, transfer, or ASI
does not prove deployed proof-contract transport inside The ASI Stack
does not reproduce Circle Calculus from this repository or vendor the external contract pack
does not create a new accepted support-state transition
